using System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis;

namespace TestNamespace
{
    partial class AbstractStatus
    {
        private static readonly Dictionary<int, AbstractStatus> _byValue = new Dictionary<int, AbstractStatus>()
        {
            [1] = Active,
        };

        private static readonly Dictionary<string, AbstractStatus> _byName = new Dictionary<string, AbstractStatus>()
        {
            ["Active"] = Active,
        };

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets all values of AbstractStatus ordered by value.
        /// </summary>
        public static IReadOnlyCollection<AbstractStatus> GetAll() => _byValue.Values;

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets the AbstractStatus instance from its value.
        /// </summary>
        public static AbstractStatus FromValue(int value)
        {
            if (_byValue.TryGetValue(value, out var result))
                return result;
            throw new InvalidOperationException($"No AbstractStatus with value {value} found.");
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets the AbstractStatus instance from its name.
        /// </summary>
        public static AbstractStatus FromName(string name)
        {
            if (_byName.TryGetValue(name, out var result))
                return result;
            throw new InvalidOperationException($"No AbstractStatus with name '{name}' found.");
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Tries to get the AbstractStatus instance from its value.
        /// </summary>
        public static bool TryFromValue(int value, [NotNullWhen(true)] out AbstractStatus? result)
        {
            return _byValue.TryGetValue(value, out result);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Tries to get the AbstractStatus instance from its name.
        /// </summary>
        public static bool TryFromName(string name, [NotNullWhen(true)] out AbstractStatus? result)
        {
            return _byName.TryGetValue(name, out result);
        }
